Hamdan bin Mohammed visits Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism, where he was briefed on the department’s plans to further accelerate the pace of economic growth in the emirate. His Highness directed officials to continue to take steps to reinforce the emirate’s economic resilience and sustain its growth momentum. He also highlighted the importance of the department’s collaborative efforts with partners across the public and private sectors to support Dubai’s position as a leading global hub for trade, tourism and investment.
